LIGHT_SWITCH.SettingHint: When enabled and not on the Lighting layer, GMs can see ambient light icons and left-click them to toggle hidden on/off.
LIGHT_SWITCH.HideByLevelSettingHint: Hide Light Switch icons if the ambient light is not in the currently viewed level/elevation.
LIGHT_SWITCH.ShowByLevelsV13SettingHint: If Levels UI range is enabled, only show light icons with elevation inside the current Levels UI range.
LIGHT_SWITCH.KeybindingToggleHint: Toggle the Light Switch tool on/off. Default: Shift+L.
